tiny_practice.action: Close your eyes and visualize resolving conflicts within your faith community through grace and wisdom, not legal battles

two_step.reflect_question: How do I currently handle disputes with fellow believers?

options.response: Pray about reconciliation and seek church mediation first
Engage directly with biblical principles of forgiveness and restoration
Speak directly to the person with love and seek understanding

creative_prompt.instruction: Draw a bridge connecting two people in conflict, with scripture verses of reconciliation written on the bridge

reevaluation.question: How has this chapter challenged my understanding of conflict resolution?
options: I see conflict as an opportunity for spiritual growth
I recognize the importance of handling disputes within the faith community
I understand that legal battles can damage Christian witness
I'm more aware of seeking wisdom and grace in disagreements

three_choice.question: Which spiritual principle resonates most powerfully in this chapter?

choices.expansion: The church community has the spiritual maturity to mediate disputes more effectively than secular courts.

choices.text: Our bodies are temples of the Holy Spirit
choices.expansion: Personal holiness and bodily integrity are profound spiritual responsibilities.

choices.text: Believers will ultimately judge spiritual realms
choices.expansion: Our current spiritual development prepares us for cosmic judicial responsibilities.

socratic_nudge.question: If Christians are called to judge spiritual matters, what qualifies us beyond our own imperfections?

moral_slider.question: How do personal freedom and spiritual accountability balance?

reevaluation.question: How has your understanding of Christian community and personal conduct shifted?

thematic_summaries.title: Christian Conflict Resolution
thematic_summaries.summary: Paul challenges believers to resolve internal disputes within the church community rather than seeking secular legal judgments. This demonstrates the spiritual maturity and unity expected among Christians.

thematic_summaries.title: Spiritual Authority and Judgment
thematic_summaries.summary: Christians are called to exercise spiritual discernment and judgment within the community of believers, recognizing their future role in divine judgment. This implies a higher spiritual responsibility and accountability.

reevaluation.question: How should believers approach internal conflicts and legal disputes?
options: Prioritize reconciliation within the church community
Seek external legal resolution as a first option
Mediate conflicts through spiritually mature church leadership
Avoid confrontation and ignore interpersonal challenges
